So like I said, if you are in this module right now, that it means you are ready. You're ready to kick off your first launch ever as a client with Gym Launch. And so why is this the first module? Why are you starting in here in the Quick Start and not in something else in this portal? Because here's the deal. There is only one way for you to not make an ROI, a return on your investment. There's only one way. And that is to not turn on your lead machine. That's it. The only way that you don't start impacting more lives, making more profit, stacking cash is by not turning on your leads. And with all the clients that we've worked with, all the clients that I've personally worked with, the number one thing that we see is the people who have the most success get their ads launched faster. Alright, so what you will learn as you go through Gym Launch is going to learn about the five core functions. You're going to learn about lead gen, lead nurture, cells, fulfillment, and resell. And if you've been following Alex for a long time, you probably already know what those things are. Well, those things do not work until you turn on your machine. Lead generation is the first one for a reason. Getting your ads launched is so important because without it, nothing else can happen. Okay, so again, this is why you're doing the quick start module because what we want to do in this module is for you to go from start to finish. And by the time you're done, you have your ads launched within before your second day. All right, definitely before your third day. So to see the fastest ROI start here.
